message:
fix: preserve existing CLAUDE.md files during install and rig add

CLAUDE.md files were unconditionally overwritten during gt install and
gt rig add, destroying user customizations. Added existence checks before
writing - only creates CLAUDE.md if file doesn't exist.

Changes:
- createTownRootCLAUDEmd() and createMayorCLAUDEmd() in install.go
- createRoleCLAUDEmd() in manager.go
- CreateMayorCLAUDEmd() in templates.go
- Updated doctor check to not flag town root CLAUDE.md as stale
- Removed obsolete tests for old overwrite behavior

Cherry-picked from PR #1151 by easel.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
